In to upon or out of the said land and premises and every part or portion thereof and together with all the title deeds vouchers and other writings therewith held or relating thereto which said land and premises have been held used and possessed by me the said Vendor. 

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said land and premises in the schedule hereto fully described with the buildings, trees and plantations standing thereon hereby sold and conveyed or expressed or intended so to be together with all and singular the appurtenances thereto belonging unto the said Purchaser company its successors, agents and assigns absolutely and forever.

And I the said Vendor for ourselves, our heirs executors and administrators do hereby covenant and agree with the said Purchaser her heirs executors, administrators and assigns that the said purchaser shall and may at all times hereafter peaceably and quietly posses and enjoy the said land and premises in the schedule hereto fully described and receive the rents and profits thereof without any interruption or disturbance by me the said Vendors or our aforewritten or any other person or persons whomsoever lawfully claiming any right or title there to and that we the said vendors have good right to convey and assign the said land and premises in manner aforesaid and that the same are free from any encumbrance and that we the said Vendors and our aforewritten shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said land and premises and every part or portion thereof unto the said purchaser and his aforewritten against any and every person or persons whomsoever and shall and will at times hereafter at the request cost and expense of the said purchaser or her afore written do and execute or cause to be done and executed all such further and other acts deeds assurances and things as the said purchaser shall or may reasonably require for more perfectly and effectually conveying and assuring the said land and premises or any part or portion thereof unto the purchaser and aforewritten.

IN WITNESS WHERE OF I the said Vendor NARIGAMA LOKUGE CHATHURA DILAN KUMARASIRI by his Attorney, PILANA VITHANAGE NILMINI KANTHI DEWIKA and Purchaser PILANA VITHANAGE NILMINI KANTHI DEWIKA do hereunto and the two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set our hands at Hikkaduwa on this TENTH DAY OF NOVEBER TWO THOUSAND TWENTY TWO (10.11.2022).

Code Number: LW/2021/04 Name & Address: A. H. Mohamed : No. 6, Church Street, Galle Fort. Consideration: - Jurisdiction: Galle Date: 30/07/2021
Aboobucker H. Mohamed Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public No. 6, Church Street, Galle Fort.
LAST WILL & TESTAMENT
No: 488
I, GEORGE ALMEIDA (holder of National Identity Card No. 390011223V) of No. 35, Lighthouse Street, Galle Fort, Galle in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka being of sound mind memory and understanding declare my intention to make and execute my Last Will and Testament.
I DO HEREBY REVOKE CANCEL AND ANNUL all former Wills Codicils and other writings or dispositions of a Testamentary nature heretofore made and done executed by me and declare this to be my LAST WILL and TESTAMENT.
I DO HEREBY NOMINATE CONSTITUTE AND APPOINT my son PETER ALMEIDA (holder of National Identity Card No. 652233445V) of the same address to be the sole Executor of this my LAST WILL and TESTAMENT hereby giving and granting him all such power and authority as are required or allowed in Law.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my beloved wife MARY ALMEIDA a life interest in my house and property bearing assessment No. 35, Lighthouse Street, Galle Fort, Galle, to enjoy the rents and profits thereof during her lifetime without the power of sale or mortgage, and upon her demise, I give devise and bequeath the same property to my two children PETER ALMEIDA and ANNE DIAS in equal shares.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my son PETER ALMEIDA my collection of antique furniture and my library of books.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my daughter ANNE DIAS all my shares held in John Keells Holdings PLC.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH the rest residue and remainder of all my properties estate and effects whatsoever and wheresoever situate including all monies in banks to my said children PETER ALMEIDA and ANNE DIAS in EQUAL SHARES.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA do hereby set my hand to this my Last Will and another of same tenor and date as these presents at Galle aforesaid on this 30th day of July Two Thousand and Twenty One.
SIGNED AND DECLARED by the above named Testator GEORGE ALMEIDA as and for his LAST WILL And TESTAMENT in the presence of us the Undersigned Witnesses who in his presence and at his request and in the presence of one another all being present together at the same time have subscribed our names hereto as attesting witnesses.
WITNESSES:
....................................
....................................

A N D

SHAMMI WEERASINGHE of No.53B, Alexandra Road, Colombo 6 (NIC No. 843251320V) in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as "the PURCHASER" which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said SHAMMI WEERASINGHE his heirs executors, administrators and assignees) of the OTHER PART.

WHEREAS the VENDOR is seised and possessed of all that land and premises marked Lot 3of Plan No.8547 dated 20.03.1980 made by T. Ratnayake Licensed Surveyor with the rights of way over Lot5 (12 feet wide) of Plan No: 3545 dated 11.03.1975 made by J. Perera Licensed Surveyor and Lot 6E (10 feet wide) of the said Plan No. 8547 morefully described in the Schedule hereto under and by virtue of Deed No.174 dated 07.12.1980 attested by F.L Jayasinghe Notary Public.

AND WHEREAS the VENDOR has agreed to with the PURCHASER to sell and convey the said divided and defined allotment of land and premises marked Lot 5 of the said Plan No.8547 morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto the Purchaser.

- : W I T N E S S E T H:-

01. The VENDOR shall sell and the PURCHASER shall purchase in his name or in the name of his nominee all that land and premises depicted as Lot 3 of the said Plan No.8547 fully described in the Schedule hereto (sometimes hereinafter called and referred to as the said premises) free of encumbrances whatsoever for the price or sum of RUPEES TWO MILLION THREE HUNDRED THOUSAND (Rs.2,300,000/-) within the time frame and in the manner and mode set out hereinafter.
The PURCHASER shall pay to the VENDOR a sum of RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)as an advance prior to or at the execution of this Agreement to be paid at the time of the execution of this agreement

On the payment of the balance purchase price of RUPEES ONE MILLION FIVE HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.1,550,000/-)to the VENDOR by the PURCHASER within six months from the date hereof the VENDOR shall execute a Deed of Transfer conveying the said premises to the PURCHASER or his nominee as the case may be.

On the execution of this Agreement and receipt of SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/=) the VENDOR shall not encumber the said premises or any part thereof by pledging, mortgaging or hypothecating or otherwise. 

05. The VENDOR doth hereby declare with and assure unto the PURCHASER that:-
5.1 The VENDOR hath good and valid title to convey the said premises as described in the Schedule hereto or as may be described in accordance with the Plan.
5.2 There are no pledges or mortgages hypothecation or liens affecting the said premises or any part thereof. 
5.3 There are no cases or proceedings affecting the said premises pending before any court or Tribunal or Authority. 
06. The VENDOR once advance payment is received from the PURCHASER shall:
6.1 Shall hand over peaceful and vacant possession of the premises to the PURCHASER.
6.2 Shall pay all rates, taxes, and electricity and water bills up to the date of the execution of this deed in relation to the said premises.
07. The PURCHASER shall complete the purchase of the said premises on or before the Tenth(10th) day of September Two Thousand and Seventeen (2017).
08. It is mutually further agreed between the VENDOR and PURCHASER:
8.1 On the PURCHASER observing and performing the several terms and conditions herein contained and the VENDOR neglecting and failing to execute the deed of transfer the PURCHASER at his option shall be entitled to:- 
8.1(i) Enforce specific performance of the VENDOR'S covenant to sell and convey the said premises to the PURCHASER or his nominee(s).
 Or
8.1(ii) Recover the moneys paid to the VENDOR under this Agreement together with interest thereon at the rate of Twenty two Percentum (22%) per mensum till the date of payment of such moneys.
On the VENDOR observing and performing the several conditions and stipulations herein contained and the PURCHASER neglecting and failing to complete the purchase on or before Tenth(10TH) day of September Two Thousand and Seventeen (2017) the VENDOR shall dorfeit RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)of the advance payment made hereunder
8.3 (i) Subject to above the PURCHASER shall take all steps to pay the balance amount of RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)within three (3) months but non payment within Six (6) months shall make the Purchaser liable for damages and interest as stated in column 8.2 hereof. 
09. All communications notices if any given hereunder shall be deemed sufficiently served if made in writing and sent under registered cover post to the respective addresses herein at the beginning given

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the VENDOR and the PURCHASER have hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at the place on the date month and year at the beginning hereof written.

DEED OF GIFT
No. 55
KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS THAT NALINI SILVA, a widow, of No. 44, Richmond Hill Road, Galle (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donor) in consideration of the natural love and affection which the said Donor has and bears unto her daughter ISHARA SILVA of No. 12, Park Road, Colombo 05 (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donee) and for diverse other good causes and considerations hereunto specially moving do hereby give grant convey assign transfer set over and assure unto the said Donee as a gift inter vivos absolute and irrevocable, subject to the life interest of the Donor herein reserved, the property in the Schedule hereto fully described and together with all rights privileges easements servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever to the said premises belonging or used or enjoyed therewith.
TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described which are of the value of RUPEES THIRTY MILLION (Rs. 30,000,000/-) unto the said Donee and her aforewritten subject nevertheless to the life interest of the Donor, the said NALINI SILVA, who shall have the full and unfettered right to possess, use, occupy and enjoy the said premises and to take and receive the rents, profits and income thereof for the full term of her natural life, and from and after the demise of the said Donor, the said premises shall devolve on the said Donee and her heirs, executors and administrators absolutely and forever.
AND the said Donor does hereby for herself her heirs executors and administrators covenant and declare to and with the said Donee that the said Donor now has good right to convey the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described in the manner aforesaid and that the said Donor and her aforewritten shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said premises unto the said Donee against any person or persons whomsoever.
AND the said Donee ISHARA SILVA does hereby thankfully accept the gift hereby made subject to the condition aforesaid.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said Donor and the said Donee do hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at Galle on this Tenth (10th) day of January Two Thousand and Twenty-Six (2026).

THIS INDENTURE is made and entered into at Dehiwala on this Fifteenth day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Four BETWEEN MR. ANURA BANDARA EDIRISINGHE (holder of N.I.C No. 751122345V) of No. 34, Hill Street, Dehiwala (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessor” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said ANURA BANDARA EDIRISINGHE his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the One Part
AND MR. KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA (holder of N.I.C. No. 880211456V) and MRS. ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA (holder of N.I.C No. 895432789V) both of No. 78, W.A. Silva Mawatha, Colombo 06 (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessees” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA and ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA their respective heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the Other Part.
WITNESSETH
WHEREAS under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer bearing No. 921 dated 10th January 2011 attested by K.L. Fernando, Notary Public of Colombo the said Lessor became the owner and seized and possessed of or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the premises bearing assessment No. 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said Lessor has agreed to lease and the Lessees have agreed to take on lease the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto for and during the term or period of Two (02) years commencing from the 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on the 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six subject to the terms and conditions hereinafter set forth and contained.
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSES that in pursuance of the said agreement and in consideration of the rent hereinafter reserved and of the covenants on the part of the Lessees to be performed and observed the Lessor doth hereby demise and let unto the Lessees the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala.
ON THIS INDENTURE FURTHER WITNESSETH and it is hereby mutually agreed by and between the Lessor and Lessees as follows:-
1. TO HOLD the demised premises with all rights and appurtenances thereto unto the Lessees for the full term or period of Two (02) Years commencing from 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six.
2. YIELDING AND PAYING THEREFOR by the Lessees unto the Lessor during the said term the monthly rental of Rupees One Hundred and Fifty Thousand (Rs 150,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka, payable on or before the fifth (5th) day of each and every month.
3. REFUNDABLE SECURITY DEPOSIT: On the signing of this agreement, the Lessees shall make a Refundable Security Deposit amounting to Rupees Nine Hundred Thousand (Rs 900,000/-), equivalent to six months' rent, which sum shall be returned to the Lessees upon the termination of this Lease free of interest and less any arrears of rent, utility bills, or costs for damages beyond fair wear and tear.
4. THE LESSEES HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSOR AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay the reserved rent on the days and in the manner aforesaid.
(b) To use the demised premises for residential purposes for the Lessees and their immediate family only.
(c) To keep the interior of the demised premises in good and tenantable repair and condition.
(d) To pay all charges for electricity, water, telephone, internet, and any other utilities consumed at the premises.
(e) Not to sub-let or part with the possession of the premises or any part thereof.
(f) To permit the Lessor or his agents with prior notice to enter and inspect the premises at reasonable times.
(g) Not to make any structural alterations to the premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor.
(h) At the expiration or sooner determination of the lease, to hand over vacant possession of the premises in the same good order and condition as it was received, fair wear and tear excepted.
5. THE LESSOR DOTH HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay all rates, taxes, and assessments payable in respect of the demised premises.
(b) To carry out all major structural repairs to the demised premises when necessary.
(c) That the Lessees, paying the rent and observing the covenants herein, shall peaceably and quietly hold and enjoy the demised premises during the said term without any interruption by the Lessor.
6. PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY MUTUALLY AGREED AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) If the rent shall be in arrears for thirty (30) days, or if the Lessees shall breach any covenant herein, the Lessor may re-enter the premises and thereupon this lease shall determine.
(b) The provisions of the Rent Act No. 7 of 1972 and its subsequent amendments shall not apply to the demised premises.
(c) Either party may terminate this agreement after the first six (06) months by giving three (03) months' prior written notice to the other party.
(d) Stamp duty and all other costs related to the execution of this indenture shall be borne by the Lessees.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the parties have set their hands hereunto at Dehiwala on the date first above written.

THIS INDENTURE is made and entered into at Dehiwala on this Fifteenth day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Four BETWEEN MR. ANURA BANDARA EDIRISINGHE (holder of N.I.C No. 751122345V) of No. 34, Hill Street, Dehiwala (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessor” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said ANURA BANDARA EDIRISINGHE his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the One Part
AND MR. KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA (holder of N.I.C. No. 880211456V) and MRS. ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA (holder of N.I.C No. 895432789V) both of No. 78, W.A. Silva Mawatha, Colombo 06 (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessees” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA and ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA their respective heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the Other Part.
WITNESSETH
WHEREAS under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer bearing No. 921 dated 10th January 2011 attested by K.L. Fernando, Notary Public of Colombo the said Lessor became the owner and seized and possessed of or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the premises bearing assessment No. 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said Lessor has agreed to lease and the Lessees have agreed to take on lease the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto for and during the term or period of Two (02) years commencing from the 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on the 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six subject to the terms and conditions hereinafter set forth and contained.
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSES that in pursuance of the said agreement and in consideration of the rent hereinafter reserved and of the covenants on the part of the Lessees to be performed and observed the Lessor doth hereby demise and let unto the Lessees the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala.
ON THIS INDENTURE FURTHER WITNESSETH and it is hereby mutually agreed by and between the Lessor and Lessees as follows:-
1. TO HOLD the demised premises with all rights and appurtenances thereto unto the Lessees for the full term or period of Two (02) Years commencing from 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six.
2. YIELDING AND PAYING THEREFOR by the Lessees unto the Lessor during the said term the monthly rental of Rupees One Hundred and Fifty Thousand (Rs 150,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka, payable on or before the fifth (5th) day of each and every month.
3. REFUNDABLE SECURITY DEPOSIT: On the signing of this agreement, the Lessees shall make a Refundable Security Deposit amounting to Rupees Nine Hundred Thousand (Rs 900,000/-), equivalent to six months' rent, which sum shall be returned to the Lessees upon the termination of this Lease free of interest and less any arrears of rent, utility bills, or costs for damages beyond fair wear and tear.
4. THE LESSEES HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSOR AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay the reserved rent on the days and in the manner aforesaid.
(b) To use the demised premises for residential purposes for the Lessees and their immediate family only.
(c) To keep the interior of the demised premises in good and tenantable repair and condition.
(d) To pay all charges for electricity, water, telephone, internet, and any other utilities consumed at the premises.
(e) Not to sub-let or part with the possession of the premises or any part thereof.
(f) To permit the Lessor or his agents with prior notice to enter and inspect the premises at reasonable times.
(g) Not to make any structural alterations to the premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor.
(h) At the expiration or sooner determination of the lease, to hand over vacant possession of the premises in the same good order and condition as it was received, fair wear and tear excepted.
5. THE LESSOR DOTH HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay all rates, taxes, and assessments payable in respect of the demised premises.
(b) To carry out all major structural repairs to the demised premises when necessary.
(c) That the Lessees, paying the rent and observing the covenants herein, shall peaceably and quietly hold and enjoy the demised premises during the said term without any interruption by the Lessor.
6. PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY MUTUALLY AGREED AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) If the rent shall be in arrears for thirty (30) days, or if the Lessees shall breach any covenant herein, the Lessor may re-enter the premises and thereupon this lease shall determine.
(b) The provisions of the Rent Act No. 7 of 1972 and its subsequent amendments shall not apply to the demised premises.
(c) Either party may terminate this agreement after the first six (06) months by giving three (03) months' prior written notice to the other party.
(d) Stamp duty and all other costs related to the execution of this indenture shall be borne by the Lessees.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the parties have set their hands hereunto at Dehiwala on the date first above written.

BETWEEN
MR. KAMAL SENARATH (holder of National Identity Card No. 750223344V) of No. 14, Lake Crescent, Boralesgamuwa (hereinafter referred to as “the VENDOR” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns)
OF THE ONE PART
AND
MR. SANDUN WIJESIRI (holder of National Identity Card No. 920334455V) of No. 75, Main Street, Piliyandala (hereinafter referred to as “the PURCHASER” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns)
OF THE OTHER PART

WHEREAS
The Vendor is seized and possessed of ALL THAT divided and defined allotment of land bearing Assessment No. 14, Lake Crescent, Boralesgamuwa under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer No. 4450 dated 12th August 2018 attested by N. Perera, Notary Public.
AND WHEREAS the Purchaser has agreed to purchase the said property for a total consideration of RUPEES TWENTY TWO MILLION (Rs. 22,000,000/=).
AND WHEREAS the parties have agreed that payment shall be made in installments over a period of eighteen (18) months.

NOW THIS AGREEMENT WITNESSETH AS FOLLOWS:

1. PURCHASE PRICE
The total purchase price of the property shall be RUPEES TWENTY TWO MILLION (Rs. 22,000,000/=).

2. PAYMENT STRUCTURE
The Purchaser agrees to pay:
Initial advance of Rs. 2,000,000/= upon execution of this Agreement.
The balance Rs. 20,000,000/= in equal monthly installments over eighteen (18) months.
All payments shall be made via bank transfer to the Vendor’s nominated account.

3. NO POSSESSION UNTIL FULL PAYMENT
It is expressly agreed that:
The Purchaser shall not be entitled to possession of the property until the full purchase price is paid.
The Vendor shall retain possession, control and ownership until execution of the final Deed of Transfer.
No equitable interest shall pass to the Purchaser prior to full payment.

4. EXECUTION OF FINAL DEED
Upon payment of the entire purchase price, the Vendor shall execute a proper Deed of Transfer in favour of the Purchaser.

5. DEFAULT CLAUSE – VENDOR RE-ENTRY
If the Purchaser:
Fails to pay any installment within thirty (30) days of due date; OR
Fails to complete payment within the agreed eighteen (18) month period;
Then:
The Vendor shall be entitled to cancel this Agreement.
All sums paid may be forfeited as liquidated damages.
The Vendor shall have the right of re-entry and full control of the property.
The Purchaser shall have no claim for refund beyond Vendor’s discretion.

6. NO ENCUMBRANCE
The Purchaser shall not:
Assign this Agreement;
Create any encumbrance or charge over the property;
Represent himself as owner before full transfer.

7. TAXES AND CHARGES
Stamp duty and registration fees for the final Deed shall be borne by the Purchaser.

8. RISK AND LIABILITY
Until execution of final Deed:
Risk of damage to property remains with the Vendor.
Vendor shall maintain insurance coverage.

9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
Any dispute shall first be settled amicably, failing which the parties may seek relief before a competent Court of Colombo.

10. BINDING EFFECT
This Agreement shall be binding upon heirs, successors and assigns of both parties.

THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO
ALL THAT divided and defined allotment of land bearing Assessment No. 14 situated at Lake Crescent within the limits of Boralesgamuwa Urban Council in the District of Colombo Western Province containing in extent TEN (10) PERCHES (A0 – R0 – P10) together with the residential house standing thereon.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF
The said parties have hereunto set their hands at Colombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of November Two Thousand and Twenty Six (2026).

The total purchase price shall be RUPEES EIGHTEEN MILLION FIVE HUNDRED THOUSAND (Rs. 18,500,000/=).

This Agreement shall be binding upon heirs, successors and assigns of both parties.

ASHFAQ HUSSAIN (NIC No. 780556677V)
OF THE OTHER PART

WHEREAS
The Lessor is seized and possessed of ALL THAT commercial office premises situated on the Third (3rd) Floor of the building bearing Assessment No. 12, Union Place, Colombo 02.
AND WHEREAS the Lessee has requested to lease the said premises for use as corporate office premises.
AND WHEREAS the Lessor has agreed to grant the lease subject to the terms and conditions hereinafter contained.

NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSETH as follows:

1. DEMISE
In consideration of the rents and covenants hereinafter reserved and contained, the Lessor doth hereby grant and lease unto the Lessee ALL THAT office premises morefully described in the Schedule hereto.

2. TERM
To hold the same unto the Lessee for a period of FIVE (05) YEARS commencing from the First (01st) day of October 2026 and expiring on the Thirtieth (30th) day of September 2031.

3. RENT
The Lessee shall pay:
Year 1: Rs. 450,000/= per month
Year 2: Increased by 10%
Year 3: Increased by further 10%
Year 4: Increased by further 10%
Year 5: Increased by further 10%
The said rent shall be payable monthly in advance on or before the fifth (05th) day of each month.

4. TAXES – VAT AND NBT CLAUSE
The Lessee shall pay:
Value Added Tax (VAT) applicable on commercial rentals.
Nation Building Tax (NBT) or any other statutory tax imposed by Government.
Such taxes shall be payable in addition to the monthly rent.

5. SECURITY DEPOSIT
The Lessee shall pay a refundable deposit equivalent to three (03) months’ rent.
The deposit:
Shall not carry interest.
May be adjusted against unpaid rent or damages.

COVENANTS BY THE LESSEE

6. COMMERCIAL USE
The premises shall be used strictly for lawful office purposes only.

7. FIT-OUT APPROVAL REQUIRED
The Lessee shall not:
Make structural alterations;
Install partitions, signage, electrical modifications or renovations;
Without obtaining prior written approval from the Lessor.
All approved fit-outs shall:
Comply with Colombo Municipal Council regulations.
Be carried out at the Lessee’s cost.
Become property of the Lessor upon expiry unless removed with consent.

8. SUBLETTING PROHIBITED
The Lessee shall not:
Sublet the whole or any part of the premises;
Assign or transfer the leasehold interest;
Permit any third party occupation;
Without the prior written consent of the Lessor.
Any unauthorized subletting shall constitute a fundamental breach.

9. MAINTENANCE
The Lessee shall:
Maintain interior in good tenantable repair.
Pay electricity, water, and service charges.
Comply with fire safety regulations.

10. INSURANCE
The Lessee shall insure its movable assets within the premises.

COVENANTS BY THE LESSOR

To ensure peaceful possession during the term.
To maintain structural integrity of the building.
To maintain common areas and lift services.

11. DEFAULT CLAUSE
If the Lessee:
Fails to pay rent within 14 days of due date;
Breaches any covenant;
Becomes insolvent or wound up;
The Lessor may terminate the Lease and recover possession.

12. EARLY TERMINATION
The Lessee may not terminate during the first three (03) years.
Thereafter termination requires six (06) months written notice.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD
The said office premises unto the Lessee for the said term subject to the covenants herein contained.

THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO
ALL THAT commercial office premises situated on the Third (3rd) Floor of the building bearing Assessment No. 12, Union Place within the Municipality of Colombo containing in extent TWO THOUSAND (2,000) Square Feet together with access to common corridors, lifts, staircases and restroom facilities.

The said parties have hereunto set their hands at Colombo on this Fifteenth (15th) day of September Two Thousand and Twenty Six (2026).

LAST WILL & TESTAMENT
No: 488
I, GEORGE ALMEIDA (holder of National Identity Card No. 390011223V) of No. 35, Lighthouse Street, Galle Fort, Galle in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka being of sound mind memory and understanding declare my intention to make and execute my Last Will and Testament.
I DO HEREBY REVOKE CANCEL AND ANNUL all former Wills Codicils and other writings or dispositions of a Testamentary nature heretofore made and done executed by me and declare this to be my LAST WILL and TESTAMENT.
I DO HEREBY NOMINATE CONSTITUTE AND APPOINT my son PETER ALMEIDA (holder of National Identity Card No. 652233445V) of the same address to be the sole Executor of this my LAST WILL and TESTAMENT hereby giving and granting him all such power and authority as are required or allowed in Law.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my beloved wife MARY ALMEIDA a life interest in my house and property bearing assessment No. 35, Lighthouse Street, Galle Fort, Galle, to enjoy the rents and profits thereof during her lifetime without the power of sale or mortgage, and upon her demise, I give devise and bequeath the same property to my two children PETER ALMEIDA and ANNE DIAS in equal shares.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my son PETER ALMEIDA my collection of antique furniture and my library of books.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH to my daughter ANNE DIAS all my shares held in John Keells Holdings PLC.
I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA DO HEREBY GIVE DEVISE and BEQUEATH the rest residue and remainder of all my properties estate and effects whatsoever and wheresoever situate including all monies in banks to my said children PETER ALMEIDA and ANNE DIAS in EQUAL SHARES.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF I the said GEORGE ALMEIDA do hereby set my hand to this my Last Will and another of same tenor and date as these presents at Galle aforesaid on this 30th day of July Two Thousand and Twenty One.
SIGNED AND DECLARED by the above named Testator GEORGE ALMEIDA as and for his LAST WILL And TESTAMENT in the presence of us the Undersigned Witnesses who in his presence and at his request and in the presence of one another all being present together at the same time have subscribed our names hereto as attesting witnesses.
WITNESSES:
....................................
....................................
I, Aboobucker H. I certify that at the time of the execution of this Last Will and Testament the said Testator was of sound mind memory and understanding.
WHICH I ATTEST

MORTGAGE BOND
Prior Registration – Con S /A4 / 211
No…..
TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS shall come MERINE (PRIVATE) LIMITED a Company duly re-registered under the Provisions of the Companies Act No 7 of 2007 bearing registration No PV35412 having its registered office at No. 12, Esther Lane, Colombo 7 in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter called and referred to as “the First named Mortgagor” which term or expression shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said MERINE (PRIVATE) LIMITED its successor/s in office and assigns) and PIPE CONDOMINIUMS (PRIVATE) LIMITED a Company duly re-registered under the Provisions of the Companies Act No: 7 of 2007 bearing registration No PV 11462 having its registered Office at No.480, Horton Place, Colombo 07 in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Second named Mortgagor” which term or expression shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said PIPE CONDOMINIUMS (PRIVATE) LIMITED its successor/s in office and assigns).

 S E N D G R E E T I N G S
WHEREAS:
the First and Second named Mortgagors (hereinafter jointly and severally called and referred to as the said “Mortgagors” ) are seized and possessed of and or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the Apartment Unit No 1C/F9/P3 fully described in the Schedule hereto (hereinafter referred to as the “Building Unit”) together with title to a proportionate undivided share in the Common Elements appurtenant to the said Building Unit as provided in the Semi Condominium Plan No.5741 dated 4th October 2008 made by M.A. Kalinga Licensed Surveyor;

the Mortgagors have requested SHANAKA WEERASNGHE (holder of Sri Lankan Passport No N0745749) of No. 23/1 Old Road, Wellawatta in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as the “Mortgagee” which term or expression shall mean and include the said SHANAKA WEERASNGHE his heirs executors administrators and assigns) to purchase the Building Unit from the Mortgagors for an aggregate amount of Rupees Ten Million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) (hereinafter referred to as “the Facility”); 

the Mortgagors have agreed to complete the construction of the said Building Unit and hand over vacant possession of the said Building Unit to the Mortgagee on or before April 2015 and has agreed to enter into and execute these Presents to give and grant the security hereinafter mentioned for the purpose of securing the due completion of the said Building Unit and/or the repayment of the said Facility together with interest, costs and other charges in the event of a default, subject to the terms and conditions contained in these Presents.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESSETH that the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with and bind and oblige themselves with the Mortgagee that the Mortgagors shall and will well and truly pay or cause to be paid all and every the sums and sum of money which now are or is or which shall or may at any time and from time to time and at all times hereafter be or become due owing and payable to the Mortgagee from and by the Mortgagors under and in terms of these presents together with interest costs and other charges. 
AND as security for such payment as aforesaid to the Mortgagee:
FIRSTLY - the Mortgagors do hereby specially mortgage and hypothecate to and with the said Mortgagee as a primary mortgage free from any and all seizures charges liens and encumbrances or claims whatsoever the entirety of the Building Unit described in the Schedule hereto together with the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the Mortgagors in to out of or upon the same (hereinafter referred to as “the said property hereby mortgaged and hypothecated”).
SECONDLY – the Mortgagors do hereby cede assign set over and assure with the said Mortgagee by way of a good and valid primary mortgage and hypothecation free from any and all seizures charges liens encumbrances all sums of money which may be recoverable or receivable under all and every contracts and contract of insurance already effected or which may hereafter from time to time be effected in respect of the said property hereby mortgaged and hypothecated and all the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the Mortgagors in to out of or upon the same
(All of which property above referred to and hereby mortgaged hypothecated and assigned are together hereinafter referred to as “the mortgaged property”).
AND the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with the said Mortgagee as follows:
(1) that the Mortgagors have good and legal right and full power and authority to mortgage hypothecate and assign the said mortgaged property in the manner aforesaid and that the same is the absolute property of and is at the full disposal of the Mortgagors and is not subject to any proceedings for acquisition or requisition by the Government or any State sponsored Corporation or other authority and that the said mortgaged property are not subject to any seizure charge lien or encumbrance whatsoever and that the Mortgagors shall and will at the request of the said Mortgagee but at the cost and expense of the Mortgagors do and execute or cause to be done and executed all such further and other acts deeds matters assurances and things for the more perfectly and effectually assuring to the said Mortgagee by way of primary mortgage hypothecation and assignment as aforesaid the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof as by the said Mortgagee shall or may be reasonably required;
(2) that the Mortgagors shall not pledge mortgage hypothecate assign or create any lien or charge on the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and shall not and will not suffer any part or portion thereof to be seized or taken in execution of any judgement/s or under or in respect of any other claim/s or proceedings whatsoever; 
(3) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times keep and maintain the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof in a fit and proper state of management repair and condition and shall and will permit any person/s duly authorized by the said Mortgagee from time to time to visit and inspect the state and order of the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof;
4) that the Mortgagors shall and will deliver to the said Mortgagee on the last day of each and every month a duly authenticated statement of the monies spent on the development of the said mortgaged property hereby assigned or expressed or intended so to be and which come under the operation of these Presents; 
(5) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times regularly and punctually pay the rates taxes assessments charges premia duties levies impositions outgoings and expenses whatsoever in respect of the said mortgaged property and procure official receipts therefore and shall and will whenever required to do so by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the said official receipts or any other writings documents relative to or as proof of any such payments aforesaid;
(6) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times at their own cost and expense insure and keep insured in the joint names of the Mortgagors as the Owner in respect of the said mortgaged property and the said Mortgagee against loss damage or destruction by fire lightning explosion malicious agency riots and strikes and such other causes and contingencies of the said mortgaged property to the full insurable value thereof with any insurer and shall and will regularly and punctually pay all and every the premia and premium or sums or sum of money for the time being necessary for keeping on foot the said policy or policies of insurance and shall and will whenever requested by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the receipts for the same and shall and will observe and comply with all and singular the terms and conditions and provisions of such policy or policies of insurance;
(7) that in case the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof be burnt down destroyed by fire or lightning or explosion or malicious agency or riots or strikes or any other cause or contingency insured against then and in any such case and as often as the same shall happen all such sums or sum of money as shall be received or be recoverable by virtue of any such insurance or insurances shall be paid by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee and shall at the option of the said Mortgagee be applied towards the discharge or part discharge of the moneys then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee under or in respect of these Presents;
(8) That the Mortgagors shall and will during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents duly and faithfully observe perform and comply with the obligations undertakings agreements and covenants on the part of the Mortgagors contained in these Presents; 
(9) Until there is a default and unless otherwise directed by the said Mortgagee the Mortgagors shall be at liberty in the ordinary course of business to sell all or any of the mortgaged property with the written consent of the said Mortgagee within the operation of these Presents. In the event of the mortgage and hypothecation and assignment created by these Presents being enforced and if the Mortgagors are called upon to do so the Mortgagors shall and will upon receipt of the proceeds of every such sale or recovery pay the same forthwith to the said Mortgagee in or towards the discharge or part discharge of the monies then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in respect of these Presents; 

AND it is hereby expressly agreed and declared as follows:

(a) that if the Mortgagors shall fail or neglect to keep the mortgaged property insured as aforesaid or deliver to the said Mortgagee the policy or policies of insurance or the receipts for the payment of premia as aforesaid or shall fail or neglect to duly pay the rates taxes assessments and other outgoings or to deliver to the said Mortgagee the official receipts thereof as hereinbefore provided or shall fail or neglect to pay any other sums or sum of money payable in fulfillment of the covenants herein contained then and in any such case it shall be lawful for but not obligatory on the said Mortgagee to pay all such premia duties outgoings and expenses and all costs payments and expenses for effecting or keeping on foot such insurances and rents rates taxes assessments and other outgoings and such other sums or sum of money aforesaid and the same together with interest thereon at the rate or rates in these Presents provided/directed shall on demand be payable to the said Mortgagee ( as the case may be) and be recoverable from the Mortgagors and shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be;
(b) that the acceptance by the said Mortgagee of the security created and effected by these Presents shall in no way or manner prejudice or affect any lien to which the said Mortgagee is by law entitled or any other securities which the said Mortgagee already hold or may at any time and from time to time hereafter hold from or on account of the Mortgagors;
(c) that if the Mortgagors shall make default in the payment of any money hereby secured or shall commit a breach of any of the covenants herein contained and on the part of the Mortgagors to be kept done observed and performed or if the Mortgagors shall at any time during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents be wound up be liquidated or enter into a composition with their respective creditors or if proceedings are taken for the winding up of the Mortgagors (whether voluntary or otherwise) or if the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof is seized or taken in execution or similar proceedings which may be available under the law of Sri Lanka or if the Mortgagors shall cease to carry on business or if any circumstance shall arise which in the reasonable opinion of the said Mortgagee may endanger the security constituted by these Presents then and in any such case it shall be lawful for the said Mortgagee to take all such steps as the said Mortgagee consider necessary to protect his interests and to enter upon and take possession of the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and of the documents of title contracts and other documents whatsoever relating to the said mortgaged property with full power to sell or dispose of the same or any part or portion thereof and all costs and expenses of such sale or disposal or in any way incidental thereto (all of which costs and expenses shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be) have been fully paid and liquidated or to exercise the powers and remedies available to the said Mortgagee under any law or legislation in Sri Lanka or at once to sue for and recover payment from the Mortgagors of all moneys due under or secured by these Presents and to obtain a hypothecary decree in respect of the said mortgaged property hereby mortgaged against the Mortgagors and to take such and all other steps to protect the interests of the said Mortgagee or if the said Mortgagee shall think fit so to do also at any time to adopt the above remedies simultaneously or successively for recovering payment of the said moneys and in the event of the said Mortgagee suing for the recovery of the moneys aforesaid the Mortgagors do hereby expressly agree that the said Mortgagee shall be entitled to have a Receiver appointed in respect of the mortgaged property pending such action who in addition to the powers and authorities conferred by law or by a competent court shall be vested with all the rights powers and authorities hereby given to the said Mortgagee without prejudice however to the right hereby given to the said Mortgagee to enter upon and take possession of the property hereby mortgaged with all the rights powers and authorities hereinbefore given;
(d) this Deed shall be security to the said Mortgagee for the balance due or from time to time due by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in relation to the monies due owing and payable by the Mortgagors in terms of these presents it being intended that the total amount of the monies hereby secured or to be ultimately recoverable by the said Mortgagee in terms of these presents from and out of the security created hereby shall not exceed the sum of Rupees Ten million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka and interest costs expenses and other charges thereon; 
(e) any statement extract writing or other documents showing the amounts due by the Mortgagors under these presents and made out of the books or documents of the said Mortgagee and signed and certified by the said Mortgagee or by any person/s who may be specially appointed for that purpose by the said Mortgagee shall be presumed to be correct in the absence of manifest error;
(f) that every notice given or demand made under this Deed and every summons or notice of any kind whatsoever in connection with any action suit or proceedings taken under these Presents shall be taken and deemed to have been duly served upon the Mortgagors if the same be sent by post under registered cover addressed to the respective Mortgagors at the respective addresses hereinbefore mentioned or to the registered office for the time being of the Mortgagors; 
(i) That this Deed shall be governed by and construed according to the laws of Sri Lanka.

THENUWARA MADHUSHANKA ELLAWALA of No 29/6, Del Kanda Road, Nugegoda (NIC No. 873472172V) in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as "the VENDOR" which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said THENUWARA MADHUSHANKA ELLAWALA and her heirs executors and administrators) of the ONE PART.
A N D

SHAMMI WEERASINGHE of No.53B, Alexandra Road, Colombo 6 (NIC No. 843251320V) in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as "the PURCHASER" which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said SHAMMI WEERASINGHE his heirs executors, administrators and assignees) of the OTHER PART.

WHEREAS the VENDOR is seised and possessed of all that land and premises marked Lot 3of Plan No.8547 dated 20.03.1980 made by T. Ratnayake Licensed Surveyor with the rights of way over Lot5 (12 feet wide) of Plan No: 3545 dated 11.03.1975 made by J. Perera Licensed Surveyor and Lot 6E (10 feet wide) of the said Plan No. 8547 morefully described in the Schedule hereto under and by virtue of Deed No.174 dated 07.12.1980 attested by F.L Jayasinghe Notary Public.

AND WHEREAS the VENDOR has agreed to with the PURCHASER to sell and convey the said divided and defined allotment of land and premises marked Lot 5 of the said Plan No.8547 morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto the Purchaser.

- : W I T N E S S E T H:-

01. The VENDOR shall sell and the PURCHASER shall purchase in his name or in the name of his nominee all that land and premises depicted as Lot 3 of the said Plan No.8547 fully described in the Schedule hereto (sometimes hereinafter called and referred to as the said premises) free of encumbrances whatsoever for the price or sum of RUPEES TWO MILLION THREE HUNDRED THOUSAND (Rs.2,300,000/-) within the time frame and in the manner and mode set out hereinafter.
The PURCHASER shall pay to the VENDOR a sum of RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)as an advance prior to or at the execution of this Agreement to be paid at the time of the execution of this agreement

On the payment of the balance purchase price of RUPEES ONE MILLION FIVE HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.1,550,000/-)to the VENDOR by the PURCHASER within six months from the date hereof the VENDOR shall execute a Deed of Transfer conveying the said premises to the PURCHASER or his nominee as the case may be.

On the execution of this Agreement and receipt of SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/=) the VENDOR shall not encumber the said premises or any part thereof by pledging, mortgaging or hypothecating or otherwise. 

05. The VENDOR doth hereby declare with and assure unto the PURCHASER that:-
5.1 The VENDOR hath good and valid title to convey the said premises as described in the Schedule hereto or as may be described in accordance with the Plan.
5.2 There are no pledges or mortgages hypothecation or liens affecting the said premises or any part thereof. 
5.3 There are no cases or proceedings affecting the said premises pending before any court or Tribunal or Authority. 
06. The VENDOR once advance payment is received from the PURCHASER shall:
6.1 Shall hand over peaceful and vacant possession of the premises to the PURCHASER.
6.2 Shall pay all rates, taxes, and electricity and water bills up to the date of the execution of this deed in relation to the said premises.
07. The PURCHASER shall complete the purchase of the said premises on or before the Tenth(10th) day of September Two Thousand and Seventeen (2017).
08. It is mutually further agreed between the VENDOR and PURCHASER:
8.1 On the PURCHASER observing and performing the several terms and conditions herein contained and the VENDOR neglecting and failing to execute the deed of transfer the PURCHASER at his option shall be entitled to:- 
8.1(i) Enforce specific performance of the VENDOR'S covenant to sell and convey the said premises to the PURCHASER or his nominee(s).
 Or
8.1(ii) Recover the moneys paid to the VENDOR under this Agreement together with interest thereon at the rate of Twenty two Percentum (22%) per mensum till the date of payment of such moneys.
On the VENDOR observing and performing the several conditions and stipulations herein contained and the PURCHASER neglecting and failing to complete the purchase on or before Tenth(10TH) day of September Two Thousand and Seventeen (2017) the VENDOR shall dorfeit RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)of the advance payment made hereunder
8.3 (i) Subject to above the PURCHASER shall take all steps to pay the balance amount of RUPEES SEVEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY THOUSAND (Rs.750,000/-)within three (3) months but non payment within Six (6) months shall make the Purchaser liable for damages and interest as stated in column 8.2 hereof. 
09. All communications notices if any given hereunder shall be deemed sufficiently served if made in writing and sent under registered cover post to the respective addresses herein at the beginning given

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the VENDOR and the PURCHASER have hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at the place on the date month and year at the beginning hereof written.

Deed 14 - DEED OF GIFT
Deed of Gift No. 2: (Spouse to Spouse - Absolute and Irrevocable)
DEED OF GIFT

F. Z. Ismail
Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public
No. 30, Galle Face Court, Colombo 03
Prior Registration:- Condominium Plan No. 150 registered in Volume C/55 Folio 12

DEED OF GIFT
No. 1150
KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS THAT MOHAMED RIZWAN of No. 50/A, Marine Drive, Colombo 06 (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donor) in consideration of the natural love and affection which the said Donor has and bears unto his wife AALIYAH RIZWAN also of No. 50/A, Marine Drive, Colombo 06 (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donee) and for diverse other good causes and considerations hereunto specially moving do hereby give grant convey assign transfer set over and assure unto the said Donee as a gift inter vivos absolute and irrevocable, the property in the Schedule hereto fully described and together with all rights privileges easements servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever to the said premises belonging or used or enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof and all the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the said Donor of in to upon or out of the same.
TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described which are of the value of RUPEES EIGHTY MILLION (Rs. 80,000,000/-) unto the said Donee and her heirs executors and administrators forever.
AND the said Donor does hereby for himself his heirs executors and administrators covenant and declare to and with the said Donee that the said Donor now has good right to convey the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from encumbrances whatsoever and that the said Donor and his aforewritten shall at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said premises unto the said Donee against any person or persons whomsoever.
AND the said Donee AALIYAH RIZWAN does hereby thankfully accept the gift hereby made.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said Donor and the said Donee do hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at Colombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of December Two Thousand and Twenty-Five (2025).
THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO-
ALL that Condominium Parcel being the apartment unit bearing No. 10-B on the 10th Floor of the building known as “Ocean Towers” bearing Assessment No. 85, Station Road, Colombo 06, forming part of the Condominium Property depicted in Condominium Plan No. 150 dated 05.01.2010 made by P. U. Weerasinghe, Licensed Surveyor. The said parcel consists of a floor area of One Thousand Five Hundred (1500) Square Feet together with the right to one car parking space in the common area designated as P-45, and together with an undivided share in the common elements of the said Condominium Property as set out in the said Condominium Plan.
We do hereby declare that we are well acquainted with the Donor and the Donee and know their proper name, occupation, and residence.
WITNESSES
A. Cassim
S. Hamid
NOTARY PUBLIC
I, F. Z. Ismail of Colombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka Notary Public do hereby certify and attest that the foregoing instrument having been duly read over and explained by me the said Notary to the within-named Donor MOHAMED RIZWAN and to the said Donee AALIYAH RIZWAN, the executants therein-named who are known to me, in the presence of Abdul Cassim and Shiraz Hamid both of Colombo, the subscribing witnesses thereto, the same was signed by the said Donor and Donee and by the said witnesses and also by me the said Notary all being present together at the same time at Colombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of December Two Thousand and Twenty-Five (2025).
WHICH I ATTEST

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described which are of the value of RUPEES EIGHTY MILLION (Rs. 80,000,000/-) unto the said Donee and her heirs executors and administrators forever.
AND the said Donor does hereby for himself his heirs executors and administrators covenant and declare to and with the said Donee that the said Donor now has good right to convey the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from encumbrances whatsoever and that the said Donor and his aforewritten shall at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said premises unto the said Donee against any person or persons whomsoever.
AND the said Donee AALIYAH RIZWAN does hereby thankfully accept the gift hereby made.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said Donor and the said Donee do hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at Colombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of December Two Thousand and Twenty-Five (2025).
THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO-
ALL that Condominium Parcel being the apartment unit bearing No. 10-B on the 10th Floor of the building known as “Ocean Towers” bearing Assessment No. 85, Station Road, Colombo 06, forming part of the Condominium Property depicted in Condominium Plan No. 150 dated 05.01.2010 made by P. U. Weerasinghe, Licensed Surveyor. The said parcel consists of a floor area of One Thousand Five Hundred (1500) Square Feet together with the right to one car parking space in the common area designated as P-45, and together with an undivided share in the common elements of the said Condominium Property as set out in the said Condominium Plan.
We do hereby declare that we are well acquainted with the Donor and the Donee and know their proper name, occupation, and residence.
WITNESSES
A. Cassim
S. Hamid

TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME THAT I, MICHAEL FERNANDO (holder of National Identity card No. 723456789V) of No. 201, Beach Road, Negombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the “VENDOR” which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said MICHAEL FERNANDO his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns).
-: S E N D G R E E T I N G S:-
WHEREAS the said vendor is seized and possessed of all that divided and defined allotment of land marked lot 3 depicted in plan No. 991 dated 2012.08.30 made by A.W. Pinto, Licensed Surveyor under and by virtue of Deed of Partition No. 345 dated 10.12.2013 from the District Court of Negombo which is morefully described in the schedule hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said VENDOR has agreed with CHATHURIKA PERERA (Holder of National Identity Card No. 858765432V) of No. 34, St. Joseph's Street, Negombo in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDEE which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said CHATHURIKA PERERA for the absolute sale and transfer unto the said VENDEE and their heirs, executors, administrators and assignees all that divided and defined allotment of land which is morefully described in the schedule hereto for a sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs. 15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the Republic of Sri Lanka.
NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS that the said VENDOR in pursuance of the said Agreement and in consideration of the said sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs. 15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the said Republic of Sri Lanka well and truly paid to the VENDOR by the said Vendee (the receipt whereof the VENDOR do hereby expressly admit and acknowledge) doth hereby sell, grant, convey, assign, transfer, set over and assure unto the said VENDEE the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto together with all and singular the rights, ways, privileges, easements advantages, servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever thereunto belonging or appertaining or usually held used occupied enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof.
TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said allotment of land hereby sold granted conveyed and assured or expressed or intended so to be together with all the rights and appurtenances thereunto belonging unto the VENDEE absolutely and forever.
AND the said VENDOR doth hereby covenant promise and agree with the said VENDEE, that the said VENDEE shall and may at all times hereafter peaceably and quietly possess and enjoy the said allotments of land hereby sold and conveyed and receive the rents income issues and profits thereof without any interruption or disturbance by the said VENDOR or any other person or persons whomsoever lawfully claiming any right or title thereto and that the said VENDOR has good right and full power and lawful and absolute authority to transfer and convey the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from all encumbrances whatsoever and that the said VENDOR shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto the said VENDEE against any and every person or persons whomsoever.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said VENDOR doth hereunto and to two others from the same tenor and date as these presents set his hand at Negombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of January Two Thousand and Twenty One (2021).
